summary: Sync accounts, notes, clipboard, settings, and window layout across Macs via iCloud.

introduced: iCloud sync for Google account metadata, notes, notification preferences, and app settings
Clipboard history sync across Macs signed into the same Apple ID
Window size, sidebar workspace, and notes pane layout restore on each Mac
iCloud Keychain sync for Google OAuth refresh tokens with automatic API reconnection
Settings panel shows iCloud sync status and credential refresh controls
Account Center shows reconnect status and iCloud Keychain connection per account
changed: New Mac setup restores accounts and preferences from iCloud — only Gmail web sign-in may be needed per device
Account metadata no longer deleted when a local web session is missing
updated: SwiftData uses separate CloudKit-backed and local-only stores for synced vs cached Google data
OAuth tokens stored with iCloud Keychain synchronizable attributes when enabled
